description: Clean manifest: no removed commands, no removed settings, only the canonical activation events (onView for the servers + welcome views, onCommand for each live command, no onLanguage / workspaceContains / createTable / editRows / servers / connectionColors). All three surviving settings have producer paths in scripts/manifest-setting-references.json.

manifest.name: mysql-azure-auth
manifest.description: A community-maintained VS Code preview for browsing and querying Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server with Microsoft Entra authentication.
